sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id UInt32, data Map(String, UInt32));
UPDATE test_map SET data = mapPartialSort((k, v) -> v, 2, data) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, mapPartialSort((k, v) -> v, 2, data) AS sorted_data FROM test_map;
SELECT id, mapPartialSort(2, map('a', 5, 'b', 3, 'c', 1)) AS sorted_map FROM (SELECT 1 AS id);
